candidates.why: Primary line representing core revenue from sale of goods; main top-line revenue measure.
Secondary operating revenue; should be considered if primary revenue line is missing for some years.
Balancing adjustment for revenue; used only as fallback if main revenue lines are missing.

variables.notes: Multiple revenue lines provided in priority order; later processing should pick first non-missing per year.

candidates.why: Income statement production input costs; best representation of cost of goods sold.
Inventory asset, not period expense; not appropriate for COGS.

candidates.row_label: Operating materials and spare parts - Net
candidates.why: Inventory/asset for materials and spares; not a P&L expense line.
Represents other operating income, not SG&A-type expense; excluded per instructions.
Duplicate style of other operating income; income not overhead expense; excluded.
Stock-based compensation, a classic SG&A overhead component.
Broad operating expense bucket, fits SG&A/overhead definition.
Another operating expense bucket that represents SG&A-type costs.

variables.notes: Excluded ‘Other operating income’ lines because they are income, not SG&A expense. Selected multiple expense components per SG&A_COMPONENTS rule.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental
candidates.why: Represents grants offsetting R&D; component rather than primary expense line.
Capitalized portion of R&D, not the period expense; secondary for XRD.
Explicit R&D expense line; best match for R&D expense (XRD).
Balance sheet intangible asset; not period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: New products development- Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization on R&D-related intangibles; not current period expense.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit R&D expense line as XRD; other R&D-related supplemental components are not needed since XRD is treated as a single line item.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value commodity contracts interest element
candidates.why: Fair value change on commodity contracts; not pure interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Write-down / reversal of write down of interest in other companies
candidates.why: Impairment/reversal on investments; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary interest expense measure net of capitalized interest; best candidate for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Gross interest on capital financing; good alternative label for interest expense.
Capitalized interest, not period expense recognized in P&L; should not be primary XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; relevant component of financing costs if main interest lines are missing.
Allocation of profit to NCI; unrelated to interest expense.
Label for NCI share of profit; not interest.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests share of comprehensive income
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation to NCI; not interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; backup for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest in associates and other companies
candidates.why: Investment balance, not an interest expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Portion of debt balance; not expense.
Current interest-bearing debt; not interest expense.
Accrued liability for interest; balance sheet item, not P&L line.
Remaining portion of current interest-bearing debt; not expense.
Equity for NCI; not interest.
Equity for minority interest; not interest.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided multiple interest expense labels in priority order so that later processing can pick the first non-missing value per year.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit(loss) from equity accounted investments
candidates.why: Income from equity accounted investments; not an equity stock measure.

candidates.row_label: Share of other comprehensive income (loss) from equity accounted companies
candidates.why: OCI share; not book equity total.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit(loss) from equity accounted financial investment
candidates.why: P&L line; not equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of equity instruments
candidates.why: Fair value changes; not total equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Share of other comprehensive income (loss) from equity accounted investments
candidates.why: OCI share; not equity stock.
Investment asset; not total book equity.
Represents total equity (likely attributable to owners); strong candidate for book equity.
Total equity including minorities; also a valid measure of book equity.

variables.notes: Chose total equity from balance sheet as book equity; provided both capitalization variants in priority order.

candidates.why: Flow of profit to NCI; not the balance sheet minority interest, but confirms presence of NCIs.
Income statement label for NCI share of profit; again a flow, not the equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests share of comprehensive income
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocated to NCI; flow item.
Balance sheet line showing NCI equity; primary candidate for MIB.
Alternative label for NCI equity; useful backup.

variables.notes: MIB is mapped to the balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interests; income statement flows are not used as the stock measure.
